metadata.reasoning_chain: ["Step 1: Analyze the Caption description of the red (X-band HH), green (X-band VV), and blue (L-band HH) channels in the right image.", "Step 2: Observe that most polarizations are described for the SAR dataset; however, L-band VV polarization is not visualized in the composite.", "Step 3: Conclude that L-band VV polarization is absent in the provided visualization."]
